data.content: Merged worktree-62fa-apply-button into main as ee3ef1dc0477 and pushed to origin/main. Bulk multi-select now supports terminal state changes plus the Apply-button/reset pattern, so the same terminal state can be applied repeatedly. Verified remote GitHub Actions for ee3ef1dc04770a0d94ee7658b3c40117be047bd8: CI success (run 23206761339) and Coverage Badge success (run 23206761365).
